title: Tsundere Unity: Nostalgia Blast
description: A kitchensink 1.7.10 modpack about bringing new version features mixed with golden age mods! We also have an official server!
body:
# Since modrinth doesn't have comments, please write your comments/requests on [my website](https://tsundereunity.com/).

# Tsundere Unity: Nostalgia Blast

We all played or watched old-modded Minecraft. What if we made a pack with current standards that don't require weird file-dropping shenanigans or bugs/incompatibilities? That's our main base idea for this **1.7.10** pack!


# Goals


Let's talk about what we try to accomplish with this pack!


## Nostalgia Blast

As the name implies, we used all the lovely mods that all old packs had and must have, with their updated forks! So you can enjoy old packs as you want!

## No need for any complicated installation

We should be able to play old modded Minecraft without the need of installing a specific version of java or spend hours on a specific bug that only happened in 2012 and the solution is "Oh I figured it out". We will do that for you instead! *ugh*

## Equally powered game styles

In a usual pack, you should go for Mekanism most of the time, op armor, op tool, extreme amounts of energy, etc. But we tweaked the mods to the "perfect" amount so that you will need to spread your wings and use multiple mods to progress properly!

## Optimization

Even though this is 1.7.10, it lags when a pack is poorly optimized, that is why we looked all around and found every single optimization and bug fix mod **that is necessary** and configured them as needed!

## Variety

Most of the time mods are only about tech or magic, we tried to synthesize that and create a great kitchen-sink modpack! In fact, we searched through all of CurseForge, Modrinth, and Github¹ multiple times to find all the good forks/new mods/QoL mods possible!

**Enough talk about our goals, let's see what we can provide!**

# Mod List
Let's start with libraries then start with actual stuff!²

## Libraries
>[FTB-Library](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/FTB-Library): Used as a library for FTB-Utilities
>
>[Gas Station](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gasstation): Used for adding Mixins!
> 
> [Apple Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applecore): "An API for modifying the food and hunger mechanics of Minecraft."
> 
> [Baubles](https://github.com/jss2a98aj/Baubles): A fork of baubles that adds extra slots for stuff like rings/necklaces/belts etc.
>  
>  [Code Chicken Library](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/CodeChickenLib) [Code Chicken Core](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/CodeChickenCore): Two dependency mods that is needed for Not Enough Items, forked and improved by GregTech team.
>   
>   [Cofh Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cofh-core) [Cofh Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cofh-lib):Library made for Team COFH mods
>    
>    [Ender Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/endercore): Library for EnderIO
>
>[False Pattern Lib](https://github.com/FalsePattern/FalsePatternLib): A library mod that solves ASM/Mixin incompatibility issues!(I don't know what that means either but it stops pack from crashing so... *shrug*)
> 
>[Forge Multi Part](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-multi-part): You know how some mods have multiple pipes in one block, yeah that's the library for that.
> 
>  [FoxLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/foxlib): A library mod for Ears and Tails mod!
> 
>[GregTech Library](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/GTNHLib): A library for Gregtech team forked mods!
> 
>[GregTech Mixins Lite](https://github.com/makamys/GTNHMixinsLite): More mixin support mods!
> 
>[Guide API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/guide-api): Library to add in game books...
> 
> [Mantle](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mantle): A library mod that even I dont know what it does... But without it pack crashes :p
>  
> [Metallurgy Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/metallurgy-core): A core mod needed for Metallurgy 4 mod.
> 
>[mcjtylib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mcjtylib): RFTools library mod!
> 
>[MixinExtras](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/MixinExtras): Mixins? MIXINS! PRAY TO GREGORY FOR THE MIXIN HARVEST SEASON!
> 
>[Mixingasm](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/Mixingasm): Solves more issues between asm and mixin loading order!
> 
> [Openmods Lib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/openmodslib): A lib needed for OpenBlocks mod.
> 
>[Ore Dictionary Initializer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ore-dictionary-initializer): Now you can use your 9 types of copper to craft the same thing!
> 
> [Uniq](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/uniq): Now there's only 1 type of copper... whoops :p
> 
> [ResourceLoader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/resource-loader): Used to load resources in Custom Main Menu!
> 
>  
>[Reborn Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reborncore): We dont have tech reborn... We just need the libraries ;-; please believe me!
> 
>[BdLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bdlib): Used as a library in multiple mods!

## Bug Fixes

>

> 
>[Healer](https://github.com/Glease/Healer): "Patch up CVE-2021-44228 for minecraft"
>

>

> 
>[Nether Portal Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/netherportalfix): Fixes portals sending players to incorrect locations.
>

## FAQ

* What's the mod pack difficulty?: Early game is nearly the same, just some QoL add-ons and making the player think differently. Mid game is slightly tweaked so extremely OP mods arent... Extremely OP? The end game is... I feel like it is not possible without Applied Energistics 2, but hey, there will be someone who finishes the pack crafting everything by hand and using wooden chests... Please don't try that :/

* There are only 30~ pages of NEI, how can I reach all the pages?: We hid all the items that seem repetitive,  not craftable, buggy, or just unnecessary to view for beginner players. You can click the 3 dots at the right of the "Basic NEI" text and select "All NEI".

* What's the goal of the pack?: There's no exact goal YET. We are still working on the pack, for now, just grind your character. Play mods that you loved to play years and years ago... then try to get all the achievements and try to keep your mental health >:D... This FAQ turned into a what to NOT do list. Oh God.

* I have a suggestion for a mod, change, or idea that I want to tell you, where can I reach you?: Well there are multiple options, we have a discord server for talking about random stuff and telling each other cool stories, if you don't like discord you can always join our official Minecraft server. We have integration so everyone in discord can read messages there, you can reach me from there!

* What main differences of this pack have from me slapping all mods in a place and calling it a day?: Our team has been working on this pack for a month now, we added new recipes, tried to make it as stable as possible, committed changes to some actively developed bugs, changed some textures, configured mods to be compatible with each other and so much more! Gameplay side we worked hard to make the game as smooth, new version-like, and optimized as possible by configuring stuff as well as possible!

* I want to get more framerates than this mod pack offers, is that possible?: ~~To get more FPS you need to install Fastcraft AND Optifine together~~ **Not possible after 1.0.4a, this is the best you can get**, If thats still not enough theres a not tested way too, you can install [LWJGL3fy](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/lwjgl3ify) on Prism Launcher! But be warned that its kinda confusing to set up and crashes.

* My game crashes when opening..? Be sure your game uses Java 8 if thats the case, if that doesnt fix your issue please join our discord and we would be glad to help you out :3

* Do you have an official server? yes we do, you can join it from main menu clicking official server button. To get latest news about it, join our discord!

**SPECIAL THANKS TO;**

Valerie for giving me the opportunity and still supporting the team mentally while all her problems going on.
My teammates for working together on this.
GregTech team for updating all these old mods with bug fixes!
Modrinth Mods that didn't get mad from my whining in their DMs :p
All the mod makers that let me use their mods in this pack <3
[Rendracula](https://www.deviantart.com/rendracula) for their free sharing of art :3

* I have the permission of all if not most of the devs of these mods, modrinth devs can contact me for the ones that they are curious about.

1- We couldn't look up all of the GitHub since there's no tag for Minecraft 1.7.10 mods updated recently with proven stability. So we only used mods of devs that are known and trusted of making stable mods.
